summary: Linden & Rye shift — pre-shift, prep, briefing, service
description: 2:00 PM pre-shift reminder to check tonight's covers, special requests, and the prep list. Arrive at Linden & Rye by 2:30 PM for prep check, mise en place review, and the 3:00 PM team briefing. Service runs to midnight or later.
location: Linden & Rye, 78 King Street, Charleston, SC 29401
creator: daniel.rodriguez@greenridertech.com

summary: Monday morning run — Battery waterfront loop
description: Morning run, 3 miles, Battery waterfront loop.
creator: daniel.rodriguez@greenridertech.com

description: Beers with Danny at a rotating spot around 6:00 PM. Willa comes over for dinner if she can.
location: Rotating spot in Charleston (often around 6:00 PM)
creator: daniel.rodriguez@greenridertech.com

description: Morning run, 3 miles, Battery waterfront loop.

summary: Friday morning run — Battery waterfront loop

description: Weekly Thursday 9:00 PM call to Rosa Rodriguez in Houston, after she is home from work. Sometimes squeezed into a service break.
creator: daniel.rodriguez@greenridertech.com

description: Batch-cook day. Check the fridge and plan the week's meals, then a big pot of chili or stew for the next few days. Plus laundry and rest.
location: Upper King Street studio apartment, Charleston, SC 29403
creator: daniel.rodriguez@greenridertech.com

summary: Brunch with Willa — Miller's All Day

description: Transfer savings to the food truck fund and review expenses.

description: Confirm there is enough albuterol for the month.

summary: Annual physical with Dr. Robert Sato

summary: Annual dental cleaning with Dr. Kim Nguyen
description: Annual dental cleaning at King Street Dental.
creator: daniel.rodriguez@greenridertech.com

summary: Daniel's birthday — low-key dinner with Willa, beers with Danny
description: Low-key celebration, usually dinner with Willa and beers with Danny.
location: Leon's Fine Poultry & Oysters, 698 King Street, Charleston, SC 29403
creator: daniel.rodriguez@greenridertech.com

description: Friendsgiving potluck with Danny and the Charleston restaurant crew on a Monday off.
